reviews.review_description: I love this and I've had my headset, well we have 3 that no one was using, so I decided to put my on while doing laundry and had a message about this app. I decided to see if i would enjoy it and oh my gosh was I caught up and laundry took two days 😅😅 My husband walked in the house and couldn't stop laughing at me because I'm 61 and I was turning around looking for my targets sweating like I was in a real battle! So Thank you to the developers for making this old Grandma reminisce about better days and remember how to laugh at myself

reviews.review_title: Fun game for senior folks as well
reviews.review_description:
Yes the arrows start out slow however as you play and win stars you can buy upgraded to more powerful bows and the capacity to hold more powerful arrows. Solve the clues and gain the gold ring at the end giving your arrows even more power. Repeat prior days and try and get 4 and 5 on every day in normal and hard modes to open the last stand game after the 24th day. The game has 4 levels of play from training to normal to  hard and survival mode. You have to survive each day killing goblins and ogars and other archers trying to kill you. After completing all  the challenges you can no longer increase your scores should you try and repeat any previous day challenges. Try a new mode of play by jumping from the towers or wall and play the game at ground level. Traverse the landscape and go after them offensively. A whole new way of play. Pause game, walk out into open space away from tower or wall, press and hold right meta button and then press and hold left pause button so both are pressed, so right button then left very close together. It may take a few repeat tries. You then drop to the ground. Use left stick to glide over ground. Get a new perspective. Archers still shoot at you where ever you are, keep moving. Don't venture too far as you will fall thru the ground and down a black hole. You have to then restart. It's just a new way of play to an already fun addictive game. 
Definitely get this game.

I am having a great time playing this game. I get a touch nauseous with games that you move your character around with the joysticks,  but this doesnt need that. The story, the challenges, and the entertainment is basic, but it doesnt detract from the fun, it enhances it.
I enjoy game but I would love to be able to play with my family!
Abousltely amazing.i had a fantastic time playing this beautifully thought out game.only thing that could be better is to make the bows have less star requiments overall best game ive ever played!!

This would be a great little game if it weren't for one fatal problem. The arrows shoot so comically slow that it ruins the experience. It makes it very difficult to time any shot where you need to lead the target. It also just feels very awkward shooting an arrow and having it float to your target like a paper airplane. If the arrows moved at an accurate rate of speed or there were an option to adjust their speed this would be 5 stars. As is, I'm going to request a refund because its just not fun.

I was enjoying this game after about 30 minutes, but then the glitches kicked in! Fist of all, I kept finding myself with my neck about a foot off the ground (which other reviewers have mentioned) - totally dizzying; had to keep exiting and rejoining. Then I discovered that I can't put the duck egg coin into the slot (an essential component of the game). So disappointing for a game that has potential to be very enjoyable.

Unfortunately on the second run my character or camera is on ground level, can move around but can not interact, joys are not visible, and can't teleport above the surface. Also as someone mentioned previously, arrows are so slow it takes away half of the joy. Please fix these.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback. 
We’ve fixed the issue,  please update to the latest version.

reviews.review_title: What I spend the most time with in VR
reviews.review_description:
It really is great fun and there is nothing like the feeling when you turn off the aim lines and hit a goblin off in the distance. 

I wish there were more Rube Goldberg mechanics where you shoot something and it causes a chain reaction. For example,  Like hitting a bee hive down off a tree or something 

But I have been having lots of fun with the game and  you can tell from the consistent updates the devs really care about putting out a good product

Whenever I start the game my head is at ankle level. Sometimes I can get to correct height and other times I just give up. Every now and again problem with arrows not releasing, doesnt seem to be a controller issue as I dont experience this issue other than this game. Cannot retrieve coin to play duck game, I can see the coin but no button combination I have tried retrieves the coin. I do like the game when everything is working and want to continue playing but is turning into more frustration than fun.

The game is so fun and i hope they add multiplayer soon, also idk how but i'm stuck on day 5 😂. I have a skill issue. I absolutley suck. AltBought it's probably because of the armor, and i have to knock it off and they're kinda fast so if you could maybe slow them down juuust i bit, that would be great

Very enjoyable game, a little quirky on loading for me, I have to press the quest button the the return to game to get the game to play properly.##
 Also I can't see the flying raven to get the side quests.
All that being said it's great game well worth the effort.
Im a little obsesses with this game. Very very very fun😂
love it

I don't usually write reviews
 but this game is A LOT of fun. You definitely won't be disappointed.
This game has got me hooked!! SO FUN!! Cant wait for more content!!
Addictive!!!!
It's a very fun game. Colourful world, not overly difficult to play and nice graphics too.
Fun, family friendly and challenge adapting archery game! Great game for kids and adults.
The game would actually be fun if the arrows didn't move 10 times slower than in any other game. At least try making it realistic. In addition, it's absolutely terrible with shadow shot VR

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review — we’re truly sorry to hear that the gameplay didn’t click for you. We finalized the arrow speed during the Beta / Early Access phase based on player feedback: most players really enjoyed how, at this pace, accurately judging distances became an important factor for landing precise shots.

As for the Shadow Shot peripheral, we actually reached out to the manufacturer earlier this year regarding official support — hopefully we’ll have some good news to share soon!

reviews.review_title: As good as I was hoping
reviews.review_description: I played tiny archers on mobile a while ago. ￼ when I saw it was available on VR I just had to play it and I have nothing bad to say about it. ￼￼￼

I can play this game fine and progress is saved, but the game never appears in the headset Library. Tried rebooting headset etc. all the games are in the library but not this one… every time I play I have to access through the Store. The Store says it’s already installed but it’s NOT in the Library!

developer_response.body:
Hi LunaEclipse15!

Sorry for the slow reply — a few weeks ago, we tried reaching out to you through the Quest system’s internal private chat, but unfortunately, we couldn’t get through.

Is it possible that the game accidentally ended up in your Hidden folder? You can bring it back by doing the following:

1. Open your Library.
2. At the top, look for the Filter option.
3. Turn on Hidden Apps to display hidden applications.
4. You’ll now see all the games you previously hid.

In the same three-dot menu, you can select Unhide App to make it visible again.

We hope this helps resolve the disappearance issue!

reviews.review_description: The experience is so different to most games it is really fun cool graphics it shoots perfect 👌 and I have no words its so fun I definitely recommend this to everyone.

Update to my review: The devs are currently hard at work, squashing bugs, listening to player feedback and adding meaningful updates to the game and game world. 

Bhaptics vest works well! I have the TactSuit Air, and it surely adds to the immersion and enjoyment of the game. It is fun to feel the arrows and fire bombs of those pesky goblins!

Tiny Archers is a fantastic game.
It is a tower defence, archery rpg. It certainly is a challenge and is suitable for all ages:) (just remember to turn off gore for the kids!) Providing hours of challenging entertainment for all.

developer_response.body:
Dear Qipper!

We’re so happy that you’re enjoying the game, and we really appreciate you taking the time to leave this review! (Oh, and sorry it took us a "while" to get back to you!)

Best regards,
The Tiny Archers Team

reviews.review_title: Why is the Game in 2D Mode WTF?!
reviews.review_description: After returning to the game, it's working in a 2D mode, WHAT HAPPENED?!

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We spent the weekend trying to reproduce the issue you encountered.
We tested it on Meta Quest 2 / 3S / 3 devices, using both older and the latest firmware versions, with the game both freshly installed and simply updated — but we haven’t been able to reproduce the problem on our end.

Could you please get in touch with us at support@1der-ent.com and let us know which device you’re using and what firmware version is installed?

Also, has the issue persisted even after a full device restart (completely powering off and then back on, not just putting it to sleep)?

Thanks so much in advance for your help — we really appreciate it and hope to resolve this for you as quickly as possible.

reviews.review_title: Totally stuck after day 24 on easy
reviews.review_description: The game seems completely stuck after day 24 on easy. There's no more missions and I've never been able to pick any side quest from the bulletin board as the only 2 missions which show a white circle says I have to finish 'proving grounds' first? The raven is pretty useless and keeps repeating about some messenger above some forest after the fourth day but I couldn't find any more info about this.

developer_response.body:
Hi there!

Thanks for reaching out! The Easy difficulty campaign consists of 24 levels — which means you’ve actually reached the end of it. However, the final mission that concludes Adam’s story (Last Stand) only becomes available on Normal difficulty or higher.

That said, all side quests (there are 12 in total) can still be completed while playing on Easy. Based on your message, it seems you're currently on the messenger raven quest — this particular raven can appear on Day 4, 5, or 6. Try replaying those levels (on any difficulty), and sooner or later (usually sooner), the messenger should show up during gameplay (pay attention to its shadow on the ground - it's flying high above you!). If you manage to shoot it down, the side quest will be marked as completed.

The next side quest will become available three in-game days later. Proving Grounds isn’t too far off either — and unlocking it will also open up a brand-new game mode on the map.

We’d recommend giving the Normal difficulty a try — it offers a significantly greater challenge than Easy, and also allows you to unlock the full experience.

We hope this helps — but if you get stuck or have any further questions, feel free to contact us anytime at support@1der-ent.com!

All the best,
The Tiny Archers team

reviews.review_description:
Great game. Fun vibrant style. Easy to jump into for new players or to demo, but has a steep learning curve for those wanting a lasting challenge. 

It becomes difficult unless you are crafting lots of special arrows, which is why this game would benefit so much from adding coop. 

Coop was promised on their roadmap, but because there are not enough reviews, they may not. They wanted 1000.....  Seems like a cheap out to me. They should add planned features regardless of review count. The game is popular, it's scored well. It's clearly a winner. 
I hope they add coop soon.

developer_response.body:
Hi Red_N1nja,

First of all, thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review and rate the game — we truly appreciate it!

We understand that tying certain planned future features (like multiplayer) to review count milestones might seem like a strange move at first. But there's a very practical reason behind it: for us, game development isn’t just a hobby — it’s also our profession and livelihood. When a game gains traction and generates enough interest to fund its continued development, it creates a win-win situation: players get new content, and we get to keep doing what we love while keeping our teams and families supported.

On the other hand, pouring months of work into a game that doesn’t reach enough players can be a serious risk for small studios like ours — we’ve sadly seen great teams fold even with a far bigger player base than ours. That’s why we try to focus our limited resources wisely.

We’re actively working on new content for Tiny Archers and we’re incredibly grateful for all the support, kind words, and high ratings we’ve received. We originally set 1000 reviews as a milestone for multiplayer, but we agree with you — that number turned out to be a bit too ambitious. Based on current growth, it would take too long. The truth is, we’re already looking into bringing co-op much sooner — perhaps even around 250 reviews. So while the milestone still exists officially, the reality is: we want this feature too, and we're looking for ways to make it happen sooner.

Thanks again for your kind review and generous rating. Your support helps us move forward — and we can’t wait to show you what’s next.

Warm regards,
The Tiny Archers Team

reviews.review_description: This game is so cool! I wasn’t expecting it to be this good—I can’t stop playing it. The mini-games add a lot of replay value, and the four difficulty levels keep it challenging. I agree with other reviews: we definitely need a multiplayer mode! I can’t wait to keep playing, and I really hope the developers continue working on it.

developer_response.body: We're super-glad you’re enjoying Tiny Archers — thank you for taking the time to leave a rating and a review! (And yes, we're still here, LOL.)

reviews.review_title: Way too hard from an experienced gamer
reviews.review_description: This game could be fun except it goes from zero to 100 difficulty in like 2 stages. Even when you finally complete a stage it only gets more difficult immediately. Very frustrating there should be hard difficulty for those seeking a steep challenge.

developer_response.body:
Ahoy!
To change the difficulty level, just click on the BACK button in the bottom left corner of the Day Selector interface — this will take you back to Difficulty Selection, where you can choose from four options: Easy, Normal, Hard, and Survival.

Any levels you unlock on a higher difficulty will also be unlocked on lower ones. We truly hope the issue is simply that the game was accidentally started on a harder setting — EASY is designed to be very forgiving and shouldn’t pose much of a challenge.

Please let us know if this solves your problem — if not, we’d be more than happy to chat and help you out at support@1der-ent.com.
Thanks so much for your feedback — we really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description:
All new users, or reviewers, let's get straight to the point, the game is great,  the end 👌 


Now get you a copy and see if you unlock the Legolas in you and come beat my score, im JDC, and im calling all of you out, (except you Sven) your a beast 


* For the Developers*


As a long time player, (25k kills) ive noticed 1 annoying bug

- Arrow draw issue after restarting a match- 

upon drawing the arrow in the match, the arrow doesn't draw in the restarted match, something happens when you restart the same map after placing the arrow on the string (survival mode) but not firing the arrow on that match but then restarting the map, and then as you reach for an arrow from your back quiver, nothing happens, the "grab arrow from quiver" becomes completely unresponsive, game requires restarting,

Great Work 1der Entertainment, you produced an excellent game

developer_response.body: Hey there! We’re absolutely thrilled that you’re enjoying our game! + A huge thanks for pointing out the bug — we’re on it, and it’ll be fixed in the next update!

reviews.review_description:
I watched gameplay Videos on YouTube and thought ok , another Wave Shooter but with Bows so give it a try. But this Game ist Not just Shot arrows as quick as possible. Precise Aiming is rewarded by every Shot. And if you Beginn to Understand how your Bow works  you are able to time time every arrow on Point. This feels so rewarding. I just wanted to have a Little fun for an Hour. But as I looked at my watch 3 Hours where gone. 
This Game is a Must but Not only for archery Fans. I Hope Multiplayer will come just Like in Elvin assassin.

developer_response.body: Hey Drachenjagd! Huge thanks for the kind words – we’ll do our best to live up to them. As for multiplayer, it’s definitely on our roadmap, and we hope to add it in the future.

reviews.review_description: This may look like a simple wave shooter tower defense but it has much more to offer including upgrades and different arrows. You need to use the special arrows at the correct time. The mini game is even a lot of fun .., even finding the silver coins to play it.

developer_response.body: Ahoy! We're so glad you're enjoying the game — and truly grateful for your review and rating! Much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Very fun, balanced dificulty, vonderfull graphics.

developer_response.body: Many thanks, much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Nice and simple tower defense. It's got very nice and colorful graphics and a skill tree which I always enjoy, making it more appealing to come back for more. I didn't give it a 5 star for it's current lack of support of the new Tactsuit Pro. I hope that the January patch, which will include support for the vest, will also include the support for the Tact Sleeves. UPDATE: The developper kindly contacted me to inform me that the TacsuitPro and sleeves are now supported. And indeed it works flawlessly. So I've updated my review to a 5 star. Really fun game.

developer_response.body: We’re really happy to hear the issue got resolved — and thank you so much for the review and rating! We’ll keep doing our best to earn your support in the future!

reviews.review_title: The best game on the store!
reviews.review_description: I’ve had the mobile version on my phone for years so when I first got my Meta Quest I recognized it in the store immediately. The developers have done an amazing job adapting the game from the format I know to the virtual world! Enjoying it tremendously so far and I hope they can complete the vision!

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you so much for the lovely review and all the stars! :)
Our not-so-secret goal is to eventually bring all the locations, characters, and enemies from the mobile version into VR — plus a story arc that ties it all together.
We’re a small team, and that’s a massive amount of work — but we’re truly grateful to have you with us on this journey. Thank you, thank you, thank you!

reviews.review_description:
First of all, I have the Shadow Shot from Dead Eye VR, so I've been trying archery games to see if my bow works with those apps. I wanted to give it a try with Tiny Archers, it works really well. At first the bow doesn't look aligned, but once you press the trigger first and pull back the arrow, the bow is aligned, so I can shoot without any issues.
The game looks really good, it's not that hard, so far I just tried the easy mode, I need more practice 😂. But I really enjoyed the free trial, so I ended up buying the game. Really fun game and well made. Thanks Devs!

Update!
I keep playing this game and keep loving it. I still play in Easy, but I think I'm getting better. I just have a problem, as I use my Shadow Shot from Dead Eye VR, when I pull back the strings while pressing the trigger I accidentally keep bumping with my thump stick and it makes me rotate, I rather rotate by myself. Is there a way of removing that?? Thanks Devs!

developer_response.body: Ahoy! Your wish is our command – the next update will include the option to disable thumbstick rotation in-game. Huge thanks for the feedback (and apologies for the slow response)!

reviews.review_description: A really great game, at least for a 68 year old. It could be for younger people too. Fun to make and there are different levels of difficulty. The characters in the game look nice. I've only shot with a basic bow, as I don't have enough money to buy a better one yet. I RECOMMEND the game to everyone

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you so much for taking the time to leave this rating and review. We’ll do our best to flood you with exciting (and free) content updates this year as well, giving you plenty of reasons to keep coming back to the game!

reviews.review_description: Love this game. One of my favorites. Fun for all. Simple. Smooth. Creative. Great design.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words and the rating — we’ll do our best to keep earning it in the future!

reviews.review_description: This game looked like it would be a very basic archery game with good bow mechanics when I first tired the demo. But when I got further, I realized that there is so much more to the game. There are more varied enemies, game modes, and quests. I have finally gotten 5 stars on all normal maps, and I have started on the hard maps. I'm hoping more updates are on the way to make the game even better.

developer_response.body: Happy New Year! Yes, we have plenty of plans for 2025: the first expansion of the year, Training Grounds, will begin development as early as next week. While the word “training” might sound boring, trust us — it’s anything but! This training takes place in the secret tower of the Wizard's Council, where you’ll need all your skill to pass the enchanters’ trials. We’ll do our best to release it within the first quarter as a free update. Thanks for the review and the rating!

reviews.review_description: I've only had my MQ3 for a couple of months but by far the most time I've spent has been in Tiny Archers. It seemed simplistic and limited at first glance but by the time I got through the demo I had to keep going. It's the most dangerous type of game, one that you can easily jump into for a few minutes but also tempts you with "just one more round." Each level comes with a set of conditions for Five-Starring it and it's difficult to just walk away when you know you were just one shot away from perfection. The controls are smooth and intuitive, and I found myself eschewing the view rotation button for simply spinning in my gaming chair and picking off goblins. You don't need much room to enjoy this one and you'll certainly get your money's worth and then some. Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to write this review, and for the high rating as well! We'll do everything we can to keep the game engaging in the long run — another free update is coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
Right this is m
y favorite game.

developer_response.body: What can we say to that? We’re deeply thankful — and incredibly happy you’re enjoying our game!!!

reviews.review_description: Super fun, very realistic and smooth. Hopefully more levels come soon.

developer_response.body: We’re truly grateful for the high rating and review! We’re working on new content, and a fresh expansion with new challenges is on the way! :)

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed it,  would be nice to have more levels.  I could never do the 3 apples off the scarecrow challenge with no guide.

developer_response.body:
Ahoy! Thank you so much for taking the time to rate the game — it wasn’t just a really kind gesture from you, but also a very wise decision! We've designed our development roadmap so that reaching a certain number of ratings unlocks the development of new content updates. In other words, as the community grows, so will the game's content. So, even if it’s just a small step, you’ve helped bring both yourself and the community closer to fulfilling your wishes, and we’re truly grateful for that!

As for the Proving Grounds mini-quest: don’t give up — you’ll get there! We’ve often heard players say it’s tough to complete, only to see them celebrate their success not long after. We know it’s not an easy challenge, but trust us — it’ll feel so much more rewarding once you conquer it than if we made it easier. Best of luck — you’ve got this! :)

reviews.review_description: Fun and smooth gameplay

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the rating and the review, much appreciated!

reviews.review_description:
Not 100% sure what to write here other than if you haven’t bought this game you should.  I played the 15 minute demo and it went by in what felt like a minute or 2 so bought the full game and love it.  Graphics are very cartoonish BUT suit the game.  More realistic graphics would take away from its charm.  I tend to, for some weird reason, hold the bow sideways which means you can’t really see the enemy count or radar menu thing but that’s more of a me issue than a fault with the game.

Sooooooo satisfying when you land a headshot -)

Only thing I would maybe change is maybe an in app purchase system where you can buy better bows for a few pounds for people like me who couldn't hit the side of a barn with a disgruntled badger.  I know you can buy them with stars you get BUT going by my progress in to so far it will take me around 4 years to collect enough to get the best bow lol.

In short, if you’re not sure then play the free 15 minutes - you’ll probably end up buying the full game as I did.

developer_response.body:
Hi FPC76!

Thank you so much for purchasing the game and for taking the time to write this review! IAP (in-app purchases) can be quite divisive among players — some have no issue with them, while others really dislike them. We’ll definitely ask our audience across our various channels how they would feel about it (of course, unlocking content through in-game currency and progress would remain an option)... especially considering that we plan to introduce additional (special) bows in the game over time.

Again, thank you – we're really glad you’re enjoying the game!

reviews.review_title: Good game potential to be a great game
reviews.review_description: Played this tonight, its ok. The aim isnt exact. Cant turn off aim assist even tho ive unticked it in the main menu. When you then play the game its still there, and even going to the in-game menu it wont allow me to disable the aim assist, it just says “enabled” and in the left a squiggly character. Some of the graphics and animation arent up to scratch. For example a goblin will come running with a bomb in the distance and he is surround by a huge transparent square. The game is easy to pick up and play. Just wish the smaller details were fixed. It is a newish game so im sure there will be updates which will help with the experience. Which im looking forward to.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you so much for your feedback! The Aid Line can’t be turned off on Easy difficulty (and it can’t be turned on in Hard mode); the option to toggle it is only effective on Normal difficulty. However, several players have requested the ability to toggle it on Easy mode as well, so we’re planning to include that in the next update. We’ll also fix the transparency issue with the fuse on the bomb-carrying goblins. If you come across any other issues, please let us know on our Discord (https://discord.gg/wQsGWZgM5N) or simply by updating your review here, and we’ll do our best to address them promptly. Thanks again for taking the time to leave this review!

reviews.review_description: Honest rating. The game is very simplistic and linear. It's not the worst game ever but it's filled with annoying little things, such as not being able to walk faster than the pace of a snail at home, and having to wait a few seconds before you can actually teleport a few feet further. Shooting arrows isn't satisfying/realistic, and the challenges are nearly impossible. Overall 6/10,  could be a 7.5 if shooting arrows didn't feel so awkward. Note: it's still early access so there's hope

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the honest, constructive criticism; we're working to address your concerns and improve the game before release.

We'll look into speeding up the elements you found slow, and regarding the shooting experience, we want to delve into the related haptic feedback to hopefully create a much better overall experience. Either way, this is on our to do list, and we won't rest until it becomes a real EXPERIENCE.

Again: we're sincerely grateful for taking the time to share your thoughts - it helps us immensely!

reviews.review_description: Fun archer game where you face great challenges. Improve your skills day by day. Very entertaining, impeccable mechanics and gameplay. Great job by the developers. I thought I wasn't going to like it and now it's one of my favorites!! Unlimited fun!

developer_response.body: We're absolutely thrilled that you enjoyed the game and that it pleasantly surprised you! We'll do everything we can to make sure you'll want to come back to it often! Thank you!!!

reviews.review_description:
Mbabcox has a legit critique regarding the money… it’s needs to be better explained.  I love the physics so far. It’s much better than I thought it’d be, especially for $5. It’s by no means perfect yet, but it has tons of potential. I love being able to shoot for the fish while waiting for enemies to threaten my tower. The objectives make the game infinitely replayable almost. I played level 2 about 15 times before I got em all and it felt GREAT once I did. 

Can’t wait to see where this game goes from here. If I had 1 complaint it’s the home world area… needs to be bigger and maybe more mini games other than the duck hunt (which is too dang fun… only wish I could play it more often but without silver coins, you can’t). 

If you’re on the fence about this one, I suggest you get it before the price increases 3 fold, especially if you enjoy archery games.

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you very much for the kind feedback (we'll definitely take the advice)!
Our QUEST & LORE update is coming at the end of February, so hopefully life around the blacksmith's shop will get a bit more lively from then on (and you'll be able to use the Duck Shooter more often too) - we hope you'll like it, we're having a lot of fun making it! :)

reviews.review_description: I bought this while it was on sale. My kids absolutely love playing it, and so do I. If you're new to VR games, this is a great start as you don't have to move around in the real world too much.

developer_response.body: We are deeply grateful for your rating and review, and we’re absolutely thrilled that the game isn’t just a hit with your kids but that you’re enjoying it too. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I liked!  A simple but very addictive game.

  Just some suggestions to the developer: Include an exit button so as not to force exit the Quest menu, also include the crouch function with one button and also the walk fast function in the main menu.  I loved the game menu! It's very original, however I think it feels a little empty, maybe add some more options like changing the gnomes' outfit, changing the settings and time of day, and finally adding more scenarios for the tower and be able to change them from the menu once they have been unlocked.

  The game is amazing as is, just suggestions for future updates :)

developer_response.body:
Hello LaCer117!

Many thanks for your kind words – among the listed suggestions, we'll be implementing several of them soon, while for some others, you'll need to wait a bit more, but they are also on the way. The main menu will offer much more excitement for the April release, you can count on that!

Thanks for the feedback, we're delighted that you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
Loved how the the arrows and the bow felt. The feeling of the enemies coming at you and the adrenaline of having to shoot at them while climbing was a blast. I was trying to sneak a peak from the top to shoot at them once they started climbing and things felt intense.
If you have played an arrow shooting game in VR before, still consider playing this one since it delivers a more alive experience thanks to the upgrade system, the leaderboards, and the mood in general.
Also, a tiny detail that I loved, the interaction to open the level selection felt so clever to me. Loved it!

developer_response.body: Many thanks for the five star review, much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Honestly I bought the game for my kids but I am the one who really fell in love with it. I'm playing almost every day and time flies while I play it

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to write this review, and we really appreciate the rating! We’ll do our best to keep the game fun and engaging in the long run – and we hope your kids enjoy it when they get their hands on it too! :)

reviews.review_description: Tiny Archers is a VR tower defense game where you have to defend your base from hordes of enemies using your bow and arrows. The game is very immersive and fun, as you can aim, shoot, and reload your arrows with realistic motions. If you want to feel like a sharpshooter in VR, this game is for you. It provides thrilling and satisfying experiences that will test your skills and reflexes.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the five star review – we pledge to uphold the standard you've come to expect and continue our journey to deliver excellence!

reviews.review_title: One of my favs with great replay-ability
reviews.review_description:
I’ve poured at least 40-50 hours into this game and keep coming back to it, they did a great job.

Mechanics are great, rock solid. Good combo of action and mechanical movement to hit the creatures. Sometimes I replay older levels to have fun and get higher on the leaderboards and other times I’ll play the harder levels to progress.

There’s normal and hard mode (no map or line assists) so plenty of replayability if you like shooting stuff with a bow and arrow.

developer_response.body: It's OFFICIAL: we have the kindest, best players on Meta Quest (we're still hesitant to call them "fans", that would be too flattering)... currently, the only ones who could probably show this much time spent in the game are our QA team members. Thank you very much!!!!!

reviews.review_description: Good, clean fun, and an easy game to pick up and just start playing. Even my GF, who’d never tried VR before, was up and shooting goblins the face in no time. If you want an engaging, fun, VR game, free of motion sickness, that pretty much anyone can play, this is for you.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review! We will strive to ensure the game provides lasting entertainment – we have plenty of ideas for updates / expansions to make it worth revisiting even months later.

reviews.review_description:
So I had the chance to play this in Beta. And couldn’t wait for release.

Simple concept. Tower defence.
But it’s super fun, orcs running through the forest and over the bridge and hills trying to climb your tower to get you. 
You have your Bow and just pick them off from a distance 
Normally when I play VR I turn with my thumb sticks..
This is the first time in my 5 yrs VR gaming I just turned on the spot, doing 360° movement on top of my tower and taking down my targets

I recommend this for any VR fan. Not just tower defence fans. Very immersive.

developer_response.body: It's players like you who make developing Tiny Archers the most rewarding journey... thank you very, very much for this glowing review!

reviews.review_description: Very nice and addictive game. Very beautiful and detailed models. The use of the bow is very satisfactory. The menu with the shop where you can buy new, increasingly powerful bows is also very nice. I can't wait for the developers to release new updates!

developer_response.body: Thanks, Ise™! We're glad that you like the game – hope you'll love the upcoming update too, which will add mini-Quests!

reviews.review_description: Great game just got the phone version as well

developer_response.body: We're so glad you’re enjoying the game — thank you for taking the time to leave a rating and a review!

reviews.review_description:
Love this game.
the bow feels great to use, feels great to nail a headshot from far away.  love the design of the orcs.

developer_response.body: Heartfelt thanks for the glowing review! Your trust is our greatest reward!
